input.name: B2SEW Premium Next.js Site
input.overview: Scaffold a new Next.js (App Router) single-page marketing site with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion, visually aligned to your industrial references (dark/navy + red SEW-style brand, premium imagery, responsive layouts). Optional Supabase can back a contact inquiry capture and/or blog cards later without blocking pure UI delivery.
input.plan:
# Ultra-premium B2SEW industrial site (Next.js + motion)

## Context

- Workspace is effectively **greenfield** (no existing app scaffold detected). Implementation will **`create-next-app`** at the project root (or path you use for `d:\games\dilaver` once available).
- Brand and content cues from your references:
  - **Palette:** deep navy/charcoal backgrounds, **white** typography, **red** accent for CTAs and highlights (matching the SEW “E” bar and tagline emphasis).
  - **Typography:** bold geometric sans (e.g. **Montserrat** or **DM Sans** for headings; **Inter** for body) loaded via `next/font`.
  - **Footer:** centered **B2SEW**, address (Mubarikpur), **`tel:+917710787777`** — from your minimal footer reference.
  - **Imagery:** use files already saved under `assets/` (paths you shared) by **copying them into `public/`** (e.g. `public/brand/logo.png`, `public/hero/...`) so Next.js can serve them with `next/image` for optimization and blur placeholders.

## Tech stack

| Layer | Choice | Why |
|--------|--------|-----|
| Framework | **Next.js 15** (App Router) | SEO-friendly routes, `next/image`, font optimization |
| Styling | **Tailwind CSS v4** (or v3 per create-next-app default) | Responsive utilities, design tokens |
| Motion | **Framer Motion** | Scroll-triggered reveals, staggered children, carousel transitions, subtle parallax on hero |
| Icons | **lucide-react** | Lightweight, consistent stroke icons |
| DB (optional) | **Supabase** | Contact submissions and/or blog post list — only if you want live data in v1 |

## Page structure (single landing, ITR + your first reference combined)

1. **Sticky header** — Logo + primary nav (Home, Products, About, Contact), **outline + red solid** CTA variants, mobile **hamburger** with focus-trap–friendly panel.
2. **Hero** — Full-viewport background (`next/image` `fill` + `priority`), dark gradient overlay, headline (**Premium auto parts for heavy machinery** or your final copy), subcopy, primary CTA; optional **slow parallax** on scroll (transform on `useScroll`/`useTransform` from `framer-motion` with `reduce-motion` respect).
3. **Intro split** — Two columns (image left / copy right), stacks on `md` breakpoint.
4. **Top sellers / gallery** — Responsive grid (`grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`), image **hover zoom + overlay** + lazy-loaded images.
5. **Welcome / features** — Second split or feature list with **icon + title + line** (echoing tagline horizontal rules); red accent on hover.
6. **Stats strip** (optional, ITR-style) — Four columns on black: **count-up** when section enters viewport (`motion` + `useInView` + animated number or lightweight counter).
7. **Product carousel** — Horizontal scroll or Embla-style carousel (Framer Motion for slide transitions); prev/next arrows, keyboard-friendly.
8. **Sustainability / full-bleed band** — Single dramatic image + centered copy + ghost button.
9. **Blog / news teaser** — One or three cards; static JSON first, **or** Supabase `select` if enabled.
10. **Footer** — Your **B2SEW** block (brand, address, clickable phone), link columns optional, social row.

## Motion system (consistent, “premium industrial”)

- **Reveal:** `whileInView` + `viewport={{ once: true, amount: 0.2 }}` for sections; opacity + `y` translate (small distance, e.g. 24px).
- **Stagger:** `staggerChildren` on grids and feature lists.
- **Hero:** Optional parallax **only if** `prefers-reduced-motion: no-pause`.
- **Buttons:** Scale `1.02` + border/background transition on hover; red fill for primary.
- **Carousel:** `AnimatePresence` for slide direction.

## Responsive behavior

- Breakpoints: mobile-first; **`lg`** for desktop nav vs burger; grids collapse 3 → 2 → 1 column.
- Touch: larger tap targets for carousel arrows and menu; no hover-only critical info.
- Images: `sizes` attribute set per section so mobile does not download desktop hero assets unnecessarily.

## Supabase (optional — does not block UI)

If you want persistence in v1:

- **Tables:** e.g. `contact_inquiries` (name, email, phone, message, created_at); optional `posts` (slug, title, excerpt, cover_image, published_at).
- **RLS:** **insert-only** for anonymous contact (via policy on `contact_inquiries`); **read** for `posts` where `published_at IS NOT NULL`.
- **Next.js:** `@supabase/supabase-js` with env `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`; server action or Route Handler for form POST to avoid exposing service role.
- If you prefer **UI-only first:** keep all copy/images in `src/content/site.ts` (or MDX later) and add Supabase in a follow-up.

## File / folder sketch (after scaffold)

- `src/app/layout.tsx` — Root layout, fonts, metadata, `Viewport` for theme color
- `src/app/page.tsx` — Compose sections
- `src/components/` — `Header`, `Hero`, `Section`, `Footer`, `ProductCarousel`, `StatBar`, `BlogTeaser`, etc.
- `src/lib/motion.ts` — Shared `variants` to avoid duplication
- `public/` — Optimized brand + section images (copied from your `assets/…`)

## Quality bar

- **Lighthouse-minded:** semantic HTML (`header`, `main`, `nav`, `section`), heading hierarchy, `aria-label` on icon-only controls, `prefers-reduced-motion`.
- **Polish:** Consistent `max-w-7xl` containers, vertical rhythm (`py-16` / `py-24`), subtle borders (`border-white/10`) on dark sections.

## What you confirm at implementation time

- Final **hero headline** and any **real product/category** names for carousel and grid alt text.
- Whether **contact form** should submit to Supabase or staymailto/`tel` only for v1.

No database is required to ship a complete responsive, animated UI; Supabase is an additive step for forms or dynamic news.

input.contents:
-- Run in Supabase SQL editor or via CLI migration tool.

create table if not exists public.posts (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  slug text not null unique,
  title text not null,
  excerpt text,
  cover_image text,
  published_at timestamptz
);

create table if not exists public.contact_inquiries (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  name text not null,
  email text not null,
  phone text,
  message text not null,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now()
);

alter table public.posts enable row level security;
alter table public.contact_inquiries enable row level security;

-- Anonymous read of published posts
create policy "posts_select_published"
  on public.posts for select
  using (published_at is not null);

-- Allow anonymous inserts for contact form (adjust if you add auth later)
create policy "contact_insert_anon"
  on public.contact_inquiries for insert
  with check (true);

-- No public read on contact rows
create policy "contact_no_select"
  on public.contact_inquiries for select
  using (false);

content.text:
Here’s what was implemented for the **ultra-premium B2SEW industrial landing page**.

### Project
- **Next.js 15.2** (App Router), **TypeScript**, **Tailwind CSS 3**, **Framer Motion**, **lucide-react** (pinned to **`0.469.0`** — the earlier `^1.14.0` resolve did not export icons correctly).
- **Inter** + **Montserrat** via `next/font` (`font-sans` / `font-display`).

### UI sections (responsive + mobile nav)
- Sticky **Header** with hamburger panel  
- **Hero** with full-bleed image, gradient overlay, CTAs, **scroll parallax** on the background (disabled when `useReducedMotion()` is true)  
- **Intro** split (image + copy)  
- **Top sellers** grid with hover zoom + labels  
- **Welcome / features** with icons and tagline-style rules  
- **Stats** strip with **count-up** when in view  
- **Product carousel** with arrows, dots, auto-advance, slide transitions  
- **Sustainability** full-bleed band  
- **Blog** grid (async server section)  
- **Contact** form + **Footer** (B2SEW, Mubarikpur address, `tel:+917710787777`)

### Design tokens
- Extended palette: **navy** scale, **brand** red (`#d81e2e`), shadows, hero gradient.

### Motion
- Shared variants in [`src/lib/motion.ts`](C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver\src\lib\motion.ts)  
- [`MotionSection`](C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver\src\components\MotionSection.tsx) for viewport reveals (supports `ref` for stats)

### Supabase (optional)
- [`supabase/migrations/001_init.sql`](C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver\supabase\migrations\001_init.sql) — `posts` + `contact_inquiries` + RLS  
- [`src/lib/supabase/public-client.ts`](C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver\src\lib\supabase\public-client.ts), [`src/lib/blog.ts`](C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver\src\lib\blog.ts) (falls back to static copy)  
- [`src/app/actions/contact.ts`](C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver\src\app/actions/contact.ts) server action (success message explains if DB isn’t connected)  
- [`.env.example`](C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver\.env.example)

### Images
- Curated **Unsplash** URLs in [`src/content/site.ts`](C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver\src\content/site.ts) + `next.config.ts` `remotePatterns` for `images.unsplash.com`. Swap in your brand shots under `public/` and point `images` / gallery arrays there when ready.

### Verification
- `npm run build` and `npm run lint` both succeed.

**Note:** The app lives under `C:\Users\dhananjay\.cursor\projects\d-games-dilaver`. If your IDE workspace is only `d:\games\dilaver`, open or sync that folder so you see the same files.

Run locally: `npm run dev`.
